It is explicitly understood that, notwithstanding anything to the contrary herein, no warranty applies to condition exceeding b4 and DSS 3, adverse currents, p/s to p/s on voyages less than 24hrs and or coastal trade, while navigating in canals, confined/ shallow/ narrow/ restricted waters and due to reasons of safety, or poor visibility etc., periods when the speed is Reduced or increased to comply with Charterers\' instructions, when assisting a Vessel in distress or when saving or attempting to save life or property at sea.
